raw_consumer_statement: Several fraudulent atm transactions were made with out my card and without my consent totalling XXXX and additional charges in the form of fees that american express serve is holding me accountable for. The transactions were made on XX/XX/2024 at an atm located at XXXX XXXX XXXX the city and state is not named in the information available to me. The person made several withdrawals over a short period. As soon as I noticed the transactions by recieving a text message from amex saying that I had a decline fee I called amex to report the fraud and had my card deactivated and requested a new card be sent out to me. I then filled out the dispute forms amex told me I had to fill out innorder to dispute these fraudulent charges. I was now told today that they are declining my dispute and saying that I authorized these charges which I did not authorize. I then called and requested the reason and documentation as to how they reached their conclusion and was told they would send an email to someone else in a different department to reopen the dispute but was told they could not tell me if the dispute was or was not being reopened. I requested phone numbers to contact the people in charge if the dispute and was told they could not give out any numbers except the same account security number I was already on the phone with. The attached document includes the card number of the card that was deactivated. I have provided the current new card number as well.
